backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko backend actor with no methods or state defined.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking two implemented features—updating testimonial dates and replacing service card icon placeholders with photos—to their relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of all frontend source files to short human-readable summaries describing each file's purpose and key content.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: SEO-optimized HTML entry point with meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Card, Google Fonts, canonical link, and JSON-LD LocalBusiness structured data for VERDIER COUVERTURE.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the single-page layout by composing Navigation, Hero, Services, About, Testimonials, Contact, and Footer sections.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: Two-column About section presenting VERDIER COUVERTURE's history, three value propositions with icons, and a certifications list—all in French.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with a validated devis request form, contact info cards (phone, email, address, hours), and a simulated form submission flow—all in French.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, contact details, service links, navigation links, and a bottom bar with copyright for Verdier Couverture.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, headline, key highlights, phone CTAs, and smooth-scroll buttons to contact and services sections.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with logo, desktop nav links, phone CTA, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu that smooth-scrolls to page sections.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Displays a grid of six roofing services (réfection, tuiles, réparation, isolation, zinguerie, traitement) each with an image, description, and feature list.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Renders a grid of six customer testimonials with star ratings, service type, date, and initials avatar for Verdier Couverture.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind base/components/utilities layers and a warm earthy (terracotta/slate) design token palette for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH brand colors (terracotta, slate, offwhite), serif/sans font families, and animation/plugin setup.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking version, summary, architectural notes, existing features, and image requirements for the VERDIER COUVERTURE roofing landing page.
